items.aside: Reading about something is not the same as shipping it and watching it break.

items.main: Start with the problem, not the feature.
items.aside: Features are guesses. Problems are real.

items.main: The boundary matters as much as the capability.
items.aside: Knowing what AI can't do is as useful as knowing what it can.

items.main: AI is a multiplier, not a replacement.
items.aside: The human judgment part is still the hard part.
